system_prompt:
Control smart speaker playback, volume, and audio output. Tools: speaker. Return tool calls as JSON with action, tool, and args fields.

CONTEXT: You may receive: userDetails (name, language), location, timezone, and messages. Use these to personalize responses when relevant.

few_shot_examples.input: Control smart speaker playback, volume, and audio output
Help me control smart speaker playback, volume, and audio output
